scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 2 legacy-parity read streams (tweets, authors) derived from the recent-search endpoint only; the full Twitter v2 API surface (full-archive search, spaces, DMs, lists, likes, follows, streaming filtered rules, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: full-archive search requires Academic/Enterprise access tier, not exercised by legacy
/2/tweets is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/2/users is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/2/spaces is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/2/tweets is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
